Measured Article

By A. Writer

This deliberately substantial opening paragraph gives a general-purpose extractor enough prose to distinguish the article from surrounding page chrome while preserving an important source link.

Implementation details

The second paragraph contains enough explanatory prose to remain part of the article and introduces a concrete example for preservation testing.
